action.reasoning: Observation: Best PESQ=3.134 (MetricGAN+). Custom CRN=2.506. Ensemble max=2.87. Fine-tuning MetricGAN+ is the most promising path to beat 3.134. Analysis: Need to understand the generator architecture (input/output format, STFT params) before fine-tuning. The generator takes magnitude spectrogram and outputs a mask. Decision: Write exploration script to inspect generator, then build fine-tuning pipeline. If fine-tuning doesn't work, fall back to MG+ baseline.
